title: senna manicula
intro: Senna manicula, also known as Senna arachnoidea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its unique, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna manicula include its potential use as a natural laxative, as well as its possible anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Senna manicula typically involve drying the leaves, which can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal use.
